folksonomy.title: Injini ya Folksonomy
folksonomy.subtitle: Vifunguo vya Kivinjari
folksonomy.description: Folksonomy inaruhusu watumiaji kuongeza lebo maalum kwa bidhaa. Vinjari vitufe vyote vinavyopatikana hapa chini, tafuta funguo maalum, au ubofye kitufe chochote ili kuona bidhaa zinazotumia.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer ni zana ya kuchunguza hifadhidata ya Ukweli wa Chakula Huria.
home.intro_2: Unaweza kuingiza msimbo wa bidhaa kwenye upau wa kutafutia hapo juu ili kuanza au ubofye mojawapo ya bidhaa zilizo hapa chini.

preferences.title: Edit your preferences
preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.
preferences.classify_products: Classify products according to your preferences
preferences.default_description: Nutri-Score, Green-Score and food processing level (NOVA)

datasources.title: Vyanzo vya Data
datasources.also_checked_by: Ukurasa wa bidhaa pia umeangaliwa na
datasources.last_modified_t: Mabadiliko ya mwisho ya ukurasa wa bidhaa kwenye {date} by
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Pakia picha wazi za bidhaa, viambato, na ukweli wa lishe ili kuwasaidia wengine kutambua bidhaa.
info.basic_info: Toa maelezo kuu kuhusu bidhaa, kama vile wingi, vifungashio na mtengenezaji.
info.languages: Ongeza majina ya bidhaa na maelezo katika lugha tofauti ili kufanya bidhaa ipatikane na watumiaji zaidi.
info.ingredients: Orodhesha viungo vyote vilivyo kwenye bidhaa. Hii husaidia watumiaji walio na mizio au mapendeleo ya lishe.
info.nutrition: Weka viwango vya lishe kwa 100g/ml kama inavyoonyeshwa kwenye kifurushi. Hii husaidia watumiaji kulinganisha bidhaa.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Kwa hiari, ongeza maoni kuelezea mabadiliko yako au kutoa muktadha wa ziada.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Thamani hii husaidia kufanya hesabu ya sawia ya kila kirutubisho kwa ukubwa wa kuhudumia. Kwa mfano, 60 g, 60g au 60 G (pendelea ya kwanza), 1000 ml au 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Weka agizo asili. Onyesha asilimia unapobainishwa. Tenganisha kwa koma au hyphen na utumie mabano kwa viungo vya kiungo.
tooltips.categories: Onyesha kategoria mahususi pekee. Kategoria za wazazi zitaongezwa kiotomatiki. Kwa mfano, 'dagaa katika mafuta ya mizeituni', 'juisi ya machungwa kutoka kwa makini'.
tooltips.product_name: Jina la bidhaa ni jina kuu lililochapishwa kwenye ufungaji. Inaweza kuwa alama ya biashara iliyosajiliwa. Kwa mfano, 'Nesquik', 'Ketchup ya Nyanya'. Usijumuishe chapa kwenye jina
tooltips.brand_name: Ingiza chapa zote za bidhaa. Chapa kuu, kwa ujumla iliyoonyeshwa wazi kwenye pakiti ya mbele, inapaswa kuingizwa kwanza. Kwa mfano, 'Nutella,' Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Nakili thamani iliyoonyeshwa kwenye bidhaa na usisahau vizio. Kwa mfano, 230g, 6 (kwa mayai 6), 3 x 150g (kwa bidhaa yenye masanduku 3, kila moja ya 150g).
tooltips.labels: Tabia yoyote ya bidhaa **ambayo ni ya kweli** na tofauti na nyanja zingine. Kwa mfano, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Imetengenezwa nchini Ubelgiji, imetolewa nchini Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Ingiza duka ambapo ulinunua bidhaa. Kwa mfano, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Ongeza viashiria vyovyote vya asili ambavyo unaweza kupata kwenye kifurushi. Huhitaji kuwa na wasiwasi kuhusu asili iliyoonyeshwa moja kwa moja kwenye orodha ya viambato. Kwa mfano, 'Nyama kutoka Argentina', 'Soya haitoki Umoja wa Ulaya'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Katika sehemu hii, unaweza kuingiza misimbo inayohusiana na alama za vifungashio, alama za utambulisho au alama za afya.
tooltips.countries: Nchi ambazo bidhaa hiyo inapatikana kwa wingi (bila kujumuisha maduka maalumu kwa bidhaa za kigeni).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Jina

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Ingiza idadi ya vitengo vya ufungaji vya sura sawa na nyenzo zilizomo kwenye bidhaa.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Ingiza jina la umbo lililoorodheshwa katika maagizo ya kuchakata ikiwa yanapatikana, au chagua umbo.
packaging_component.material_desc: Weka nyenzo mahususi ikiwa inaweza kubainishwa (msimbo wa nyenzo ndani ya pembetatu mara nyingi unaweza kupatikana kwenye sehemu za vifungashio), au nyenzo ya jumla (kwa mfano plastiki au chuma) ikiwa huna uhakika.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Ingiza maagizo ya kuchakata tu ikiwa yameorodheshwa kwenye bidhaa.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Ingiza uzito wa wavu au ujazo wa wavu na uonyeshe kitengo (kwa mfano g au ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

edit.no_nutrition_data: Hakuna habari juu ya lishe ya bidhaa

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Usipakie picha ambazo humiliki au huna haki nazo. Kupakia picha zilizo na hakimiliki bila ruhusa ni kinyume cha sheria na kunaweza kusababisha akaunti yako kusimamishwa.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Pakia tu picha zako mwenyewe au zile ambazo una ruhusa wazi ya kutumia.

network.title: Hitilafu ya Muunganisho
network.message: Imeshindwa kuunganisha kwenye seva ya Open Food Facts. Tafadhali angalia muunganisho wako wa intaneti na ujaribu tena.
network.instructions: Tatizo likiendelea, tembelea Ukurasa wa Hali ya Ukweli kuhusu Chakula.

landing.title: Fungua Kichunguzi cha Ukweli wa Chakula
landing.subtitle: Hifadhidata shirikishi, isiyolipishwa na wazi ya bidhaa za chakula kutoka kote ulimwenguni. Gundua, tafuta na uchangie katika uwazi wa chakula kwa kila mtu.
landing.explore_products_desc: Vinjari mamilioni ya bidhaa za chakula, angalia ukweli wa lishe na ufanye maamuzi sahihi.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

explore.title: Gundua Ukweli wa Chakula Huria
explore.subtitle: Gundua bidhaa zinazovuma, kategoria maarufu, na uchangie uwazi wa chakula!
explore.trending_products_desc: Tazama ni bidhaa gani zinazotazamwa na kuhaririwa zaidi hivi sasa.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Vinjari kategoria maarufu za vyakula kwenye hifadhidata yetu.
explore.recently_added_desc: Angalia bidhaa za hivi punde zilizoongezwa na jumuiya.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Saidia kuboresha Ukweli wa Chakula Huria kwa kuongeza au kuhariri bidhaa, au kujibu maswali.
explore.random_product_desc: Kujisikia bahati? Gundua bidhaa nasibu kutoka kwa hifadhidata yetu.
explore.learn_more_desc: Jua jinsi Ukweli wa Open Food hufanya kazi na jinsi unavyoweza kusaidia.
